summary: Bug fix for ProfitTrackerPage crash + Signal deactivation bug verified FIXED. Found and fixed missing 'resetNewBalance' state variable that caused 'ReferenceError: resetNewBalance is not defined' crash on the Profit Tracker page. Signal deactivation/reactivation via PUT /api/admin/signals/{id} working correctly after is_official field was added to TradingSignalUpdate model.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Missing resetNewBalance state variable causing crash: 'ReferenceError: resetNewBalance is not defined'
bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.impact: CRITICAL - Profit Tracker page was completely broken and would not load

issues: DialogContent requires DialogTitle for screen reader accessibility - console warnings from Radix UI (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: The AdminActionsPanel component extraction left props (resetNewBalance, setResetNewBalance) that were referenced but not defined in ProfitTrackerPage.jsx
The refactoring created a dependency gap - component expects props that parent never defined as state
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test signal ID 4121c573-9099-4acf-b3f8-03efae3bb70e
context_for_next_testing_agent: Signal deactivation bug is FIXED (is_official field added to TradingSignalUpdate model). ProfitTrackerPage crash is FIXED (added missing resetNewBalance state). StatsCards and AdminActionsPanel components extracted correctly and working. All 4 stat cards visible (Account Value, Deposits, Total Profit, LOT Size). Access Records and Reset Tracker dialogs functional.
